title: Server Chat Heads UPDATED
description: Use player heads in chat and more via placeholders! Credits to CatDevz for making the original Minestom code. (ported to latest versions)
body:
# Server Chat Heads
# _**Required Dependency: [Polymer](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymer)**_

Use player heads in chat and more via placeholders! Credits to CatDevz for making the original Minestom code. THIS IS A FORK OF THE ORIGINAL FABRIC PORT, UPDATED AND MAINTAINED BY **[random_revilo](https://modrinth.com/user/random_revilo)**

![The mod working in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/657cf3fd34a4a08e285b47a3417d4e9f96269b91.png)

## How it works
When a player joins its skin gets downloaded and the colors of the pixels of the face get extracted and put in a User UUID, TextColor[][] Map, when the placeholder gets invoked, it searches for the user in that map and tries to print the head in chat using negative spaces and a custom pixel font.

![Placeholders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7892c4fdae043edb8d636e4313878f4e0a27e9d7.png)

Credits
- [CatDevz](https://github.com/CatDevz) for making the [original Minestom code](https://canary.discord.com/channels/706185253441634317/1042351571930984448/1042352421176885318)
- [Camper_Samu](https://github.com/CamperSamu) for making the [Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-chat-heads) port
[TheEpicBlock for PolyMC](https://github.com/TheEpicBlock/PolyMc)
- [Patbox](https://github.com/Patbox) for [Polymer](https://github.com/Patbox/Polymer), a part of PolyMC and the core of many Serverside mods (like this one)
- [Fabric Server-Side Development Discord](https://discord.gg/spsDnxp) for helping me while making this mod and other mods (like [WAYF?](https://github.com/CamperSamu/WhereAreYouFrom) or [PolyForgery](https://github.com/CamperSamu/PolyForgery))
**
- [**random_revilo (me)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-chat-heads-updated/settings/description) for porting the mod to latest versions and maintaing it
